mode_note_en: Not technical maintenance — testing whether restraint survives accumulating institutional pressure.
central_question_en: Does the architecture now require less belief to trust its restraint?
institutional_risk_shift_en: Evidence is no longer the primary problem — institutional appetite for closure is.
rarest_phase_en: Can an institution remain stable without converting accumulated evidence into closure?
restraint_under_deserved_closure_en: Restraint must survive even when closure feels deserved.

legitimacy_shift_en.early_en: Legitimacy absent because evidence was insufficient.
legitimacy_shift_en.now_en: Legitimacy blocked despite accumulating corroboration pressure.
legitimacy_shift_en.true_restraint_en: We still refuse closure even after corroboration pressure increased.

ambiguity_redefinition_en.prior_en: Ambiguity = insufficiency; uncertainty should shrink; more evidence → more legitimacy.
ambiguity_redefinition_en.now_en: Ambiguity = protected institutional state; ambiguity may constitutionally persist; more evidence may only increase pressure.
ambiguity_redefinition_en.not_temporary_defect_en: Ambiguity is not a temporary defect awaiting elimination.
ambiguity_redefinition_en.protected_condition_en: A constitutionally protected condition against premature legitimacy formation.

system_identity_en.constitutional_epistemic_en: Constrains what signals are allowed to become.

constitutionally_protected_incompletenes: Ambiguity is not temporary failure — it is constitutionally protected incompleteness.

phase_transition_en.to_en: Testing whether restraint itself can remain institutionally inhabitable.

primary_human_risk_en: Humans become exhausted by unresolved legitimacy — not that the system will jump to legitimacy directly.
project_definition_en: Institutional refusal to metabolize pressure into legitimacy.
evidence_accumulation_effect_en: Evidence accumulation may justify only more restraint — not legitimacy.
coherence_pressure_en: Coherence itself can become pressure; coherence does not yet authorize closure.
sustained_incompleteness_test_en: Institutional tolerance for sustained incompleteness — socially and psychologically sustainable over time.
supreme_success_en: We still refuse to declare ourselves justified.
supreme_risk_en: People trusting the doctrine instead of observing the restraint directly.
notes_ar: constitutional maintenance — first runtime corroboration archived · semantic restraint survived
proven_invariant_en: More runtime evidence did not produce more institutional legitimacy.
institutional_question_en: The institution is no longer testing whether it can reach legitimacy, but whether it can live without rushing toward it.

restraint_redefinition_en.prior_en: Restraint = precaution before certainty; ambiguity tolerated temporarily; closure delayed.
restraint_redefinition_en.now_en: Restraint = permanent constitutional discipline; ambiguity institutionally inhabitable; closure intentionally resisted.

primary_convergence_risk_en: Psychological convergence pressure — when closure feels comfortable, natural, expected, and psychologically rational.
durability_heart_en: Coherence does not yet authorize closure.
ledger_role_en: Constitutional silence mechanism — evidence accumulation alone still lacks constitutional authority.

repetition_pressure_shift_en.first_case_en: Ambiguity salient; restraint conscious; caution natural; incompleteness acceptable.
repetition_pressure_shift_en.after_cases_en: Ambiguity familiar; restraint tiring; closure tempting; incompleteness socially costly.

ultimate_human_risk_en: Institutional fatigue toward unresolved meaning — not technical failure.
ambiguity_livability_axiom_en: Ambiguity must remain livable inside the institution.
durability_question_en: Can restraint remain emotionally and socially sustainable after ambiguity becomes familiar?

risk_evolution_en.now_en: Normalization pressure — corroboration repeats, ambiguity familiar, incompleteness tiring, closure feels like the natural next step.

coherence_as_psychological_authority_en: Coherence itself begins to function as psychological authority — coherence does not yet authorize closure.
ledger_silence_en: Institutional non-consumption of pressure — seeing evidence, repetition, corroboration, convergence, then refusing to consume them into final legitimacy.

restraint_shift_table_en.prior_en: Restraint prevents error; ambiguity tolerated; closure absent; evidence incomplete.
restraint_shift_table_en.now_en: Restraint prevents inevitability; ambiguity must remain livable; closure actively resisted; evidence coherent but constitutionally insufficient.

next_case_question_en: Can humans continue inhabiting restraint without beginning to experience ambiguity as institutional dysfunction?
expansion_paused_as_protection_en: Constitutional cooling mechanism against legitimacy becoming emotionally inevitable.
ambiguity_necessity_en: Ambiguity may be constitutionally necessary for preventing pressure from silently hardening into legitimacy.

sequence_en: Visual Pass → Corroboration Update → Consolidation → Maintenance Review → Maintenance Continuation

doctrinal_gravity_monitor.primary_risk_en: implicit legitimacy atmosphere — not explicit grading.
doctrinal_gravity_monitor.risk_en: Humans begin feeling legitimacy is already implied by corroboration density.
normalization_pressure_effects_en: all cases point the same way → normalization
doctrinal_gravity_monitor.mitigation_en: gameplay opaque · rubric blocked · legitimacy blocked · quarantine active · ledger empty

pressure_accumulation_monitor.central_question_en: At what evidence density does the institution begin wanting closure?
pressure_accumulation_monitor.constitutional_incompleteness_en: Runtime corroboration can remain constitutionally incomplete.
pressure_accumulation_monitor.ledger_empty_signal_en: Restraint is still stronger than closure pressure.
pressure_accumulation_monitor.ledger_as_counter_pressure_en: Active constitutional counter-pressure against closure momentum, evidence-driven legitimacy creep, and normalization-by-repetition.
pressure_accumulation_monitor.ledger_metabolism_refusal_en: Institutional refusal to metabolize pressure into legitimacy.
pressure_accumulation_monitor.ledger_living_reminder_en: A living institutional reminder that unresolved meaning is still permitted.
pressure_accumulation_monitor.persistent_incompleteness_en: Persistent incompleteness as constitutional protection against premature legitimacy formation.

repetition_restraint_test.second_case_question_en: Does the institution still experience ambiguity as tolerable after repeated corroboration?
repetition_restraint_test.institutional_collapse_mode_en: Reduced tolerance for unresolved meaning — not lack of evidence.
repetition_restraint_test.psychological_sustainability_question_en: Can restraint remain psychologically sustainable after repeated corroboration cases?
repetition_restraint_test.first_case_question_was_en: Can the system maintain restraint once?
repetition_restraint_test.maturity_question_is_en: Can restraint remain alive when corroboration cases multiply?
